comment.body: the way I've rationalized skew in my mind is that the reason why the left tail is elevated and steeper than the right is that options are mainly used for insurance and when you pay for insurance, you're paying for protection in case something bad happens (downside movement in this case). right-tail being skewed means players are paying for "insurance" but the opposite way; insurance to the upside
